column1: # Reviewed, accepted alerts. ZAP's baseline rules file only honors IGNORE/WARN/FAIL — the
# earlier INFO level here was silently unsupported, so these four still failed CI. IGNORE
# drops them from the failing set (they no longer appear in the report); the review rationale
# lives in this file instead. All other baseline warnings retain their default failing WARN.

column3: (Public build comments and a minified UI string; reviewed for secrets)
